title: opkg
html:
opkg

Shell

Generate the Debian package with [fpm](https://github.com/jordansissel/fpm) and upload it to the target. ``` echo 'exec /bin/sh' >x.sh fpm -n x -s dir -t deb -a all --before-install x.sh . ```

rpm opkg install x_1.0_all.deb
excerpt: opkg Shell Generate the Debian package with [fpm](https://github.com/jordansissel/fpm) and upload it to the target. ``` echo 'exec /bin/sh' >x.sh fpm -n x -s dir -t deb -a all --before-install x.sh . ``` rpm opkg install x_1.0_all.deb
